output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q205033 p:P54 ?teamStatement ; ps:P54 ?player .
  ?teamStatement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?teamStatement pq:P582 ?endDate
  }
  .
  FILTER(?startDate <= "2023-02-28" ^^ xsd:date &&(! BOUND(?endDate) || ?endDate >= "2022-09-01" ^^ xsd:date))
  ?player p:P413 ?posStatement .
  ?posStatement ps:P413 wd:Q1382033 .
  ?posStatement pq:P580 ?posStartDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?posStatement pq:P582 ?posEndDate
  }
  .
  FILTER(?posStartDate <= "2023-02-28" ^^ xsd:date &&(! BOUND(?posEndDate) || ?posEndDate >= "2022-09-01" ^^ xsd:date))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
